title: PlanetMosaicRecipe
description:
A SEPAL Planet Mosaic recipe. Produces a cloud-masked composite from Planet imagery — either Planet's NICFI Basemaps (free for tropical forests, monthly mosaics) or Planet Daily / user-supplied basemap collections.

**Pipeline.** (1) Load the configured Planet ImageCollection (`sources.assets`). (2) Filter to AOI bounds and `dates`. (3) Compute a per-pixel cloud score and mask pixels above `options.cloudThreshold`, optionally buffered. (4) For DAILY: optional histogram matching to a reference image. (5) Composite to a single image and add indices.

**Threshold scaling.** `options.cloudThreshold` and `options.shadowThreshold` are stored as **fractions in [0, 1]** (NOT percentages). The GUI displays them as 0–100 then maps via `1 - slider/100` on save (so a slider value of 85 persists as `0.15`).

aoi.description: Area of Interest. Planet Mosaic supports an Earth Engine table or a hand-drawn polygon.

dates.title: PlanetMosaicDates
dates.description: Half-open date interval `[fromDate, toDate)`. Earliest valid `fromDate` is `2013-04-01` (Planet's earliest imagery).

fromDate.description: **Inclusive** start date. Must be on or after `2013-04-01` and strictly before `toDate`.

toDate.description: **Exclusive** end date. Scenes acquired ON `toDate` are NOT included — set to the day AFTER the last day you want covered. For the full year 2024 use `2025-01-01`, NOT `2024-12-31`.

sources.title: PlanetMosaicSources
sources.description:
Planet collection selection.

- The GUI exposes 3 user-facing buttons: `NICFI` (free tropical-forest basemaps), `BASEMAPS` (Planet Basemaps, paid), `DAILY` (Planet Scope daily). The GUI maps the `NICFI` button to model `source: 'BASEMAPS'` plus the 3 hard-coded NICFI assets — so the persisted model only ever has `source: 'BASEMAPS'` or `source: 'DAILY'`. Use the LLM-friendly `terms` to disambiguate.
- For BASEMAPS with NICFI assets, pass the canonical 3-asset NICFI list. For other basemaps, pass the user-supplied `[assetId]`. For DAILY, pass `[<dailyCollectionAssetId>]`.

source.description: Persisted source identifier. `BASEMAPS` covers both NICFI (the GUI's NICFI button) and any user-supplied basemap collection asset. `DAILY` is Planet Daily / Scope.

assets.description: Earth Engine ImageCollection asset ids. For NICFI use exactly: `['projects/planet-nicfi/assets/basemaps/africa', 'projects/planet-nicfi/assets/basemaps/asia', 'projects/planet-nicfi/assets/basemaps/americas']`. For other basemaps or DAILY, supply the user's asset id(s) as a single-element array.

cloudThreshold.description: Maximum cloud-score (0–1) before a pixel is masked. Pixels with cloud score `> cloudThreshold` are masked. Default `0.15` (a fraction; the GUI's 85% slider maps to this). Lower values are more aggressive.

cloudBuffer.description: Buffer around detected clouds in meters (Form.Buttons → discrete: 0 = none, 120 = moderate, 600 = aggressive).

histogramMatching.description: Histogram-match scenes to a reference. Only meaningful for `source='DAILY'`; ignored for BASEMAPS. Default `DISABLED`.
